items.claim: Kong Wang has a high-level kickboxing background, including a win over Valentina Shevchenko.
items.quote: Kong Wang is a former professional kickboxer. Kong Wang beat Valentina Chevchenko in kickboxing.

items.claim: Kong Wang's loss to Gabriella Fernandez was due to being rocked on the feet rather than a deficiency in grappling.
items.quote: No, she got rocked. She got hit real hard, dropped, and then Gabriella pounced and choked her out.

items.claim: Tracy Cortez does not inflict significant damage with her takedowns.
items.quote: Tracy Cortez is not dangerous. She gets takedowns and does nothing with them.

items.claim: Luke Riley is a fast, clean, and accurate striker.
items.quote: Luke Riley is a very good striker. He's fast. He's clean. He's accurate.

items.claim: Prospects from Cage Warriors tend to wilt when faced with high-pressure opponents who challenge their takedown defense.
items.quote: if he is anything like a lot of these other big prospects from Cage Warriors, they wilt.

items.claim: Kai Kamaka III is a busy striker who utilizes forward pressure and leg kicks.
items.quote: Busy striker, good forward pressure. He'll blast the legs.

items.claim: Adrien Yanez is a slow starter who often concedes the first round.
items.quote: He's a slow starter, so he's giving up a round.

items.claim: Adrien Yanez is a technical striker who avoids overcommitting in his exchanges.
items.quote: Adrien Yanz is a good technical striker who likes to play that game. He's not going to overcommit.
